title: Form Message Style
description: Type definition for the message display style in form fields. Determines how validation and error messages are positioned relative to form inputs.

sections.title: Type Definition
sections.description: The AXFormMessageStyle type definition showing all available message styles

props.name: AXFormMessageStyle
props.description: Union type defining the available message styles for form fields. 'bottom' displays messages below the input field, while 'float' displays messages in a floating position.
